subcodes.first_line: O Master Darvish of the All-Glorious Beauty, my spirit and my very essence a sacrifice for His loved ones, in the final verses of the celebrated ode [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آقا درویش جمال ذوالجلال روحی و کینونتی لاحبائه الفداء در نهایت غزل مشهور
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @poems and quotation from poetry, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
